title: For marketers, agency owners & freelancers:
author: Total-Assumption-203
selftext:
**For marketers, agency owners & freelancers:**

Are you spending 15–20 hours every week writing Proposals, Strategy Briefs, Campaign Plans, Creative Briefs, Monthly Reports, Client Emails, and adapting Brand Voice?

I used to.

Until I started using **AgencyOS** — a complete operating system built as a Claude Skill.

It now generates all of these deliverables automatically at a senior account director level, saving me 15–20 hours per week.

That means more time for new clients, strategy, or just having a life.

If you’re a:

* Freelance marketer
* Small/medium agency owner
* Account manager drowning in paperwork

I’m offering the full files for a very small trial price in exchange for your honest feedback (I really want to improve it based on real users).

Just DM me the word **“AgencyOS”** and I’ll send you all the details.

Looking forward to your thoughts 🔥
